articles.author: Will Weissert
articles.title: Iran war could make Trump’s trip to China a bit chillier than his first-term visit - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump's trip to China may not come with the same fanfare that accompanied his first-term visit. In 2017, China went all out to welcome the new American president. For this week's get-together between Trump and China's Xi Jinping, the Iran war…
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) Long before this weeks trip to China, President Donald Trump was already predicting on social media that his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping, would give me a big, fat hug when I get t… [+7206 chars]
